content:
🌟 gogcli | Go
🎯 Primary Use Case: Managing and automating Google Workspace services directly from the command line.
✨ Key Features: • Gmail management (search, send, labels, etc.) • Calendar event management (create, update, conflicts, etc.) • Drive file management (list, search, upload, download, permissions) • Contacts management (search, create, update) • Tasks management (tasklists, tasks)
📖 Summary: gogcli is a fast, script-friendly command-line interface for managing various Google Workspace services, including Gmail, Calendar, Drive, and more. It offers JSON-first output, support for multiple accounts, and secure credential management, making it ideal for automation and terminal-based workflows.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

✨ portabase | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Simplifying and automating database backups and restorations for various database engines in a self-hosted environment.
✨ Key Features: • Database backup and restore tool • Supports PostgreSQL, MySQL/MariaDB, MongoDB • Web UI for management • Integrates with Portabase agents for secure operations • Self-hosted and open-source
📖 Summary: Portabase is a self-hosted, open-source tool designed to simplify database backup and restoration for PostgreSQL, MySQL/MariaDB, and MongoDB. It leverages a web UI and integrates with agents for secure and efficient operations, making database management accessible for developers and DevOps professionals.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

💡 geoai | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Applying state-of-the-art deep learning models to geospatial data for analysis and visualization, accessible through Python and a QGIS plugin.
✨ Key Features: • Interactive and programmatic search and download of remote sensing imagery and geospatial data • Automated dataset preparation with image chips and label generation • Model training for classification, detection, and segmentation
📖 Summary: GeoAI is a Python package that integrates artificial intelligence with geospatial data analysis. It provides tools for processing satellite imagery and vector data, training AI models for tasks like segmentation and classification, and visualizing results, with seamless integration into QGIS.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

🌟 eclaire | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a private, self-hosted AI assistant that can intelligently organize, search, and automate tasks across a user's diverse personal data without relying on cloud services.
✨ Key Features: • Local-first and self-hosted AI assistant • Unifies diverse data types (tasks, notes, docs, photos, bookmarks) • Privacy-focused with local models and data storage
📖 Summary: Eclaire is a self-hosted, local-first AI assistant designed to unify and process personal data, including tasks, notes, documents, photos, and bookmarks. It prioritizes privacy and extensibility, allowing users to run it entirely on their own hardware with local models and data storage.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

🚀 dockmon | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Monitoring and managing Docker containers across multiple hosts with automated restart and alerting capabilities.
✨ Key Features: • Multi-Host Monitoring • Agent-Based Remote Monitoring • Real-Time Dashboard • Real-Time Statistics • Real-Time Container Logs
📖 Summary: DockMon is a comprehensive platform for monitoring and managing Docker containers. It offers real-time insights, automated recovery, and multi-channel alerts for containerized applications.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source

🚀 face_looker | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Creating interactive and engaging UI elements, such as portfolio headers or avatars, where a face image appears to follow the user's cursor.
✨ Key Features: • Generate AI-powered face images with varying gaze directions • Create a sprite/grid sheet of all generated faces • Interactive React hook to make faces follow cursor • Option to use Replicate model for easy generation • Option to use Python script for advanced control over generation
📖 Summary: Face Looker is a project that generates AI-powered gaze-tracking face images and provides an interactive React component to display them. It allows users to create engaging UI elements where a face image dynamically follows the cursor's position.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
